# Container

Constrains content width to a maximum size and centers it horizontally.

## Import

```jsx
import { Container } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| maxW | `string` | `breakpoint-lg` | Maximum width |
| centerContent | `boolean` | `false` | Center child elements |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Content |

## Usage

```jsx
<Container maxW="lg" py={8}>
  <Heading>Page Title</Heading>
  <Text>Page content goes here</Text>
</Container>
```
